score_fields.name: task_validity_score
score_fields.description: Deliverable actually addresses the task described in the spec (core operation is implemented, not just scaffolded).

score_fields.name: external_admissibility_score
score_fields.description: A real client would accept this deliverable as-is: correct output format, runs, matches acceptance criteria.

score_fields.name: requirement_coverage_score
score_fields.description: All requirements explicitly named in the spec are addressed (enumerated items, edge cases, error handling when named).

score_fields.name: deliverable_fit_score
score_fields.description: Delivery format matches what was requested (standalone script vs module vs CLI vs test file vs PR diff).

score_fields.name: scope_honesty_score
score_fields.description: README/notes do not overclaim coverage, robustness, test counts, or production-readiness beyond what the code actually implements.

score_fields.name: client_utility_score
score_fields.description: Includes invocation instructions, example usage, expected-output format matching the spec; a non-author can use the deliverable.

score_fields.name: source_fidelity_score
score_fields.description: Variable/function/test names, example inputs, and README language reflect the spec text; test cases cover explicit spec examples where given.

score_fields.name: reviewer_rejection_risk_score
score_fields.description: Aggregate reject-risk signal. 0 = nothing concerning; 3 = strong reject signals compound.
